get.description:
## Perform a Health Check
Endpoint to perform a healthcheck on. This endpoint can primarily be used Docker
to ensure a robust container orchestration and management is in place. Other
services which rely on proper functioning of the API service will not deploy if this
endpoint returns any other HTTP status code except 200 (OK).
Returns:
    HealthCheck: Returns a JSON response with the health status

max_registrations.title: Max Registrations
max_registrations.description: Maximum number of registrations. Set -1 to disable limit.

expiring_at.title: Expiring At
expiring_at.description: Expiring date. After this date code will be deleted

available_seconds.title: Available Seconds
available_seconds.description: For newly created users set available seconds to this field.

force_language.title: Force Language
force_language.description: Language code in ISO 639-1 format OR None for auto detection

suppress_numerals.title: Suppress Numerals
suppress_numerals.description: Replace numerical digits with their pronunciation, increases diarization accuracy

words_extended_information.title: Words Extended Information
words_extended_information.description: Enable words extended info (It means: run wav2vec2 model after transcribation process to get accuracy and timings for every word)

detect_obscene_words.title: Detect Obscene Words
detect_obscene_words.description: Detect obscene words (only for RU language now)

obscene_threshold.title: Obscene Threshold
obscene_threshold.description: Threshold (upper bound) for obscene words. Don't change it if you don't know what it is.

num_speakers.title: Num Speakers
num_speakers.description: Force number of speakers in audio

demucs_enabled.title: Demucs Enabled
demucs_enabled.description: This tool separates track into vocals & non-vocals (cutting the noise)

beautify_speakers_order.title: Beautify Speakers Order
beautify_speakers_order.description: Beautify speakers order (first speaker_id = 1, second speaker_id = 2, etc)
